word: H5376 - נְשָׂא - nᵉsâʼ - nes-aw' - Carry away

sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׂא

Transliteration: neśâ'

Phonetic: nes-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to lift, bear, take, carry
    1. (Peal) to take
    2. (Ithpael) to make a rising, make an insurrection

Origin: corresponding to H5375

TWOT entry: 2874

Part(s) of speech: Verb
